title: Crown Jewel Chat — Intent Gate, Persona System & Conversational Engine
summary: Rebuilt octane chat from a broken experience (hi → 15-second web search) into an intelligent conversational interface. Added IntentGate pre-classifier, CommandMapper for NL→CLI decomposition, ChatEngine with persona-aware conversation fast path, and reasoning stream with bullet-point planning. Users never need CLI syntax in chat — they talk naturally and the system figures out what to run.

features.name: IntentGate — Pre-OSA Intent Classifier
features.description: Classifies every user message into one of 5 intents (CONVERSATION, COMMAND, RECALL, ANALYSIS, WEB) BEFORE the OSA pipeline runs. Uses 3-tier classification: exact-match bypass for greetings (instant), regex patterns for recall/command/analysis signals, LLM fallback for ambiguous queries. Default bias toward conversation over web search.

features.name: CommandMapper — Natural Language to Octane Operations
features.description: Translates natural language into one or more Octane internal operations using a command manifest of 20+ operations (portfolio, research, compare, extract, recall, system health, etc.). LLM-powered mapping with keyword fallback. Outputs structured CommandPlan with reasoning bullets and resolved parameters. Aggressively infers intent: 'I am thinking about Apple' → research.start.

features.name: Persona System — Named AI Assistant
features.description: Added assistant_name and assistant_personality to user preferences (Redis-backed, permanent). Users can name their assistant ('octane pref set assistant_name bunny') and customize personality. Chat prompt, display name, and synthesis all use persona. New /name and /persona slash commands in chat.

features.name: ChatEngine — Conversational Fast Path
features.description: New ChatEngine class handles all 5 intent paths. CONVERSATION goes direct to LLM with persona prompt (no agents, no web search — sub-second). COMMAND routes through CommandMapper with reasoning stream. RECALL queries memory with persona-aware synthesis. ANALYSIS and WEB delegate to full OSA pipeline. Fixes the original 'hi triggers web search' bug completely.

features.name: Reasoning Stream — Visible Planning
features.description: When the ChatEngine maps a command or starts an operation, it streams the reasoning plan as readable bullet points before execution. Users see what the system decided to do in plain English (not raw thinking tokens). Command operations show operation IDs being run.

features.name: Chat REPL Refactor — Intent-Routed Loop
features.description: Rewired the chat REPL loop to use ChatEngine for normal mode (deep mode still uses direct OSA). Added /persona and /name slash commands. Display name is persona-aware (shows 'Bunny:' instead of 'Octane:') throughout the session. Persona loaded from prefs on startup.

new_files: octane/osa/intent_gate.py — Pre-OSA intent classifier (5 intents, 3-tier classification)
octane/osa/command_mapper.py — NL→CLI decomposition with 20+ operation manifest
octane/osa/chat_engine.py — Central chat brain with persona-aware routing
tests/unit/test_session37_chat.py — 62 unit tests for all Session 37 features
modified_files: octane/cli/chat.py — REPL refactored to use ChatEngine, added /persona /name commands
architecture_changes.data_flow: User input → IntentGate.classify() → ChatEngine.respond() → [CONVERSATION: direct LLM | COMMAND: CommandMapper → execute → synthesize | RECALL: memory search → synthesize | ANALYSIS/WEB: OSA pipeline]

key_fixes: 'hi' no longer triggers a 15-second web search — routed to conversation fast path
'this does not feel natural' no longer triggers web search about feelings
Short messages (1-3 words) default to conversation instead of web search
Ambiguous queries default to conversation (not web search) — bias toward natural chat
